title: JNVST IX Class (Lateral Entry) 2025 Online Form

detail.short_info: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti has Conducting JNVST IX Class (Lateral Entry) Exam 2025. Candidates With 8th Class can Apply Online.

content.text: Name of the Post: JNVST IX Class (Lateral Entry) 2025 Online Form

Brief Information: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti has given an employment notification for Conducting the Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Selection Test (JNVST 2025) for IX Class Lateral Entry Admission 2025. Those Candidates who are interested in the admission details & completed all eligibility criteria can read the Notification & Apply Online.

items.label: Important Dates
items.text: Last Date to Apply Online: 26-11-2024 Date of Online Correction Window: 27-11-2024 & 28-11-2024 Date of Exam: Saturday, 08th February 2025

items.label: Age Limit
items.text: Candidates Born between 1st May 2010 to 31st July 2012 (both days inclusive)

seo_tags: JNVST IX Class (Lateral Entry) 2025 – Apply Online for Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Selection Test
